items.title: Lyft’s CEO Says, ‘We’re the Good Uber’
items.summary: David Risher insists that Lyft has lowered its prices and that customers who only check his competitor’s app are “leaving money on the table.”
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Samsung's Freestyle+ projector is now available for $1,200
items.summary: Samsung's Freestyle+ projector is a tiny unit which can play movies on the most uneven of surfaces.
